content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.parallel_orchestrator
FILE: cosmos/core/parallel_orchestrator.py (61 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Parallel AI Orchestrator.

"Why use one brain when you can have a committee that actually agrees for once?"

This module handles fan-out/fan-in processing for LLM requests.
It allows running the same prompt across different models (Ollama, xAI, Gemini)
and fusing the results.

CLASSES:
- ParallelAIOrchestrator
  Methods: async def dispatch_parallel(self, prompt: str) -> list[str]
  Methods: async def fused_consensus(self, prompt: str) -> str

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_parallel_orchestrator(backends)
